message:
Enhance jfp search with personal prompt integration

Extends the search command to include personal prompts for authenticated
premium users. Implements graceful merging of local and remote search
results with proper source attribution.

## New Search Flags

```bash
jfp search "query"           # Smart default (local for free, all for premium)
jfp search "query" --mine    # Search only personal prompts
jfp search "query" --saved   # Search only saved/bookmarked prompts
jfp search "query" --all     # Search everything (local + personal)
jfp search "query" --local   # Search only local registry
```

## Implementation Details

### Type Definitions

- `PersonalPromptResult`: API response format for personal prompts
- `MergedSearchResult`: Unified result format with source attribution
  - Includes `source` field: "local" | "mine" | "saved" | "collection"
  - Includes `matchedFields` for search relevance info

### Core Functions

1. **searchLocal()**: Wraps existing searchPrompts() with unified return format
   - Converts SearchResult[] to MergedSearchResult[]
   - Adds source: "local" attribution

2. **searchPersonal()**: Searches personal prompts via API
   - Builds endpoint list based on flags (--mine, --saved, --all)
   - Fetches from /cli/search/mine, /cli/search/saved concurrently
   - Handles auth errors with helpful messages
   - Returns combined results with appropriate source tags

3. **mergeResults()**: Combines local and personal results
   - Deduplicates by prompt ID (personal overrides local)
   - Sorts by score descending
   - Applies limit after merge

4. **searchCommand()**: Main orchestrator
   - Determines search mode based on flags and auth status
   - For --mine/--saved: requires auth, searches only personal
   - For --all: searches both local and personal
   - For --local or unauthenticated: searches only local
   - Smart default: premium users get --all, others get --local

### Output Formats

**Human-readable output**:
```
  [local] Idea Wizard (score: 0.95)
          Generate improvement ideas for any project
          Category: ideation | Tags: brainstorming, ultrathink

  [mine]  My Custom Prompt (score: 0.87)
          Personal prompt for code review
          Category: documentation | Tags: review
```

**JSON output**:
```json
[
  {
    "id": "idea-wizard",
    "title": "Idea Wizard",
    "score": 0.95,
    "source": "local",
    "matchedFields": ["title", "description"]
  }
]
```

### Error Handling

- Not authenticated + --mine/--saved: Exit with login hint
- API errors: Fall back to local-only with warning
- Network failures: Graceful degradation to local results

### CLI Registration (index.ts)

Added four new options to the search command:
- --mine: Search only personal prompts
- --saved: Search only saved prompts
- --all: Search everything (public + personal)
- --local: Search only local registry

## Related Bead

Implements jeffreysprompts.com-94r0: "Add search integration for personal
prompts in CLI"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -45,6 +45,10 @@ cli
 cli
   .command("search <query>", "Fuzzy search prompts")
   .option("--limit <n>", "Max results (default: 10)")
+  .option("--mine", "Search only your personal prompts")
+  .option("--saved", "Search only your saved prompts")
+  .option("--all", "Search everything (public + personal)")
+  .option("--local", "Search only local registry")
   .option("--json", "Output JSON")
   .action(searchCommand);
